+/**
+ * @test
+ * @summary Check that null-restricted fields of value records work.
+ * @enablePreview
+ * @compile --release ${java.specification.version} NullRestrictedAnnotation.java
+ */
+public class NullRestrictedAnnotation {
+    public R! r; //this will inject @jdk.internal.vm.annotation.NullRestricted
+
+    public NullRestrictedAnnotation() {
+        r = new R();
+        super();
+    }
+
+    public value record R() {}
+
+}
\ No newline at end of file
